'''Abregado-rae''',<ref name="Light" /> also known simply as '''Abregado'''<ref name="Traveler's Guide">''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]''</ref> and sometimes spelled '''Abregado-Rae''', was a trade [[Planet|world]]<ref name="Where">{{SW|url=news/where-in-the-galaxy-are-the-worlds-of-star-wars-the-force-awakens|text=Where in the Galaxy Are the Worlds of ''Star Wars: The Force Awakens''?|int=Where in the Galaxy Are the Worlds of Star Wars: The Force Awakens?}}</ref> located in [[the galaxy]]'s [[Core Worlds]].<ref name="TFABG" /> It was situated at the beginning of the [[Rimma Trade Route]].<ref name="Where" /> Abregado-rae had the reputation to be a rather lawless world, and its main [[spaceport]] was as close to a safe dock for [[smuggler]]s as could be found in the Core.<ref name="SWHC1">{{HelmetCollectionCite|1|Databank A-Z}}</ref>

During the [[High Republic Era]], a [[Unidentified countess|countess]] living on Abregado-rae ordered a [[saberfish]] from [[Tibrin]] for her private [[aquarium]], with it being transported to the Core in the [[starship]] ''[[Legacy Run]]''. After the saberfish became ill due to her people not knowing how to care for it, the countess paid for the ''Run'' to return the [[fish]] to Tibrin.<ref name="Light" />

During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire]], the [[Pyke Syndicate]] controlled the [[Abregado-Rae Spaceport]]. Around [[5 BBY]],<ref name="Date 2">''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the flashbacks of [[Bounty Hunters 12|''Bounty Hunters'' 12]] to around [[5 BBY]].</ref> the [[bounty hunter]] [[Caviness Thorn]] and his [[Caviness Thorn crew|crew]] took a bounty on [[Han Solo]] on the planet, planning to ambush him at the spaceport. The bounty hunter [[Beilert Valance]] soon came into the fold, agreeing to help Thorn until he learned that the target was Solo, who was formerly a fellow [[Imperial cadet]] with Valance. The job devolved into a skirmish between Valance and Thorn's crew, resulting with Solo and his [[Wookiee]] companion [[Chewbacca]] escaping.<ref name="Bounty Hunters 12" />
